name: March of the Monarchs
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>進</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>撃</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>帝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Tribute Summoned monsters you control cannot be destroyed by card effects, also neither player can target them with card effects. You cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck.
eff: Tribute Summoned monsters you control cannot be destroyed by card effects, also neither player can target them with card effects. You cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck.

sets.set: Egyptian God Deck: Slifer the Sky Dragon

mst: Prevents other cards being targeted by card effects
Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects
summoning: Prevents the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
